The 'get_current_task' function in the Linux kernel before 4.13.1 does not properly handle the case where a task is deleted while it is being processed, which allows local users to gain privileges or cause a denial of service (memory corruption and system crash) via a crafted application, related to fs/proc/array.c and kernel/sched/sched.c.

The 'libc' library in GNU Libc before 2.23, as used in GNU Binutils, does not properly handle certain invalid input to the 'strtol' function, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (crash) or execute arbitrary code via a crafted string, related to the 'strtol' function.

The 'get_user_cred' function in the Linux kernel before 4.13.1 has incorrect handling of the 'struct user_namespace' structure, which allows local users to obtain sensitive information from kernel memory, aka Linux Kernel Vulnerability 2017-10-03.

The asn1_write_ContextSimple function in libcutils in Android before 5.1.1 does not validate the length of the data to be written, which allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service (assertion failure and application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted ASN.1 data stream, related to asn1.c.

The 'libc' library in Android before 5.1.1 does not properly handle certain invalid UTF-8 sequences, which might allow remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) or execute arbitrary code via a crafted string, related to the 'strtod' function.

The 'get_user_pages' function in the Linux kernel before 4.13.1 does not properly validate the 'nr_pages' parameter, which allows local users to cause a denial of service (memory consumption) or possibly have unspecified other impact by leveraging improper input to the 'get_user_pages' function, aka Linux kernel 'get_user_pages' DoS.

The 'get_next_line' function in libft in 42 School projects has a buffer overflow issue, which might allow remote attackers to cause a denial of service (application crash) or possibly have unspecified other impact via a crafted file, related to gnl-leaks.c.
